chunk_id1.Sub Heading 1: ADDING NEW PRINTERS FOR COMMON CRADLE LINE .....

Text:
![](_page_0_Picture_1.jpeg)

WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – ADDING NEW PRINTERS

## **ADDING NEW PRINTERS FOR COMMON CRADLE LINE**

When new printers need to be added to the Common Cradle Line, the following steps need to be completed

**Step 1:** Have the printer added to the Zebra Network and in the Oracle Linux Operating System The addition can be requested by creating a new ServiceNow request:

[https://zebra.service-](https://zebra.service-now.com/sp?sys_kb_id=ab7f1a7bdbda01d08d5245e813961959&id=kb_article_view&sysparm_rank=3&sysparm_tsqueryId=12ff8209db45ed188d5245e8139619f0)

[now.com/sp?sys\\_kb\\_id=ab7f1a7bdbda01d08d5245e813961959&id=kb\\_article\\_view&sysparm\\_rank=3&sysparm\\_](https://zebra.service-now.com/sp?sys_kb_id=ab7f1a7bdbda01d08d5245e813961959&id=kb_article_view&sysparm_rank=3&sysparm_tsqueryId=12ff8209db45ed188d5245e8139619f0) [tsqueryId=12ff8209db45ed188d5245e8139619f0](https://zebra.service-now.com/sp?sys_kb_id=ab7f1a7bdbda01d08d5245e813961959&id=kb_article_view&sysparm_rank=3&sysparm_tsqueryId=12ff8209db45ed188d5245e8139619f0)

![](_page_0_Figure_8.jpeg)

Click on the 'Printer Setup Request' at the bottom of the page to create the request, or use the following link:

## [https://zebra.service-](https://zebra.service-now.com/com.glideapp.servicecatalog_cat_item_view.do?v=1&sysparm_id=298a9fa00f142300e590847022050e72)

[now.com/com.glideapp.servicecatalog\\_cat\\_item\\_view.do?v=1&sysparm\\_id=298a9fa00f142300e590847022050e7](https://zebra.service-now.com/com.glideapp.servicecatalog_cat_item_view.do?v=1&sysparm_id=298a9fa00f142300e590847022050e72) [2](https://zebra.service-now.com/com.glideapp.servicecatalog_cat_item_view.do?v=1&sysparm_id=298a9fa00f142300e590847022050e72)

Once the request is submitted, this will be processed by the Network, Linux and Oracle Administration teams. Thus adding the printer to the Oracle system.

**Step 2:** Add the printer to the ERP Value Set (lookup) that defines the Parent & Child printers used in the Common Cradle line.

The addition can be requested by creating a new ServiceNow request using the following link:

[https://zebra.service-now.com/sp?id=sc\\_cat\\_item&sys\\_id=f8e0c0920f864200df9ce64be1050e2e](https://zebra.service-now.com/sp?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=f8e0c0920f864200df9ce64be1050e2e)

Important fields to select/enter:
Metadata: "Sub heading": "ADDING NEW PRINTERS FOR COMMON CRADLE LINE: ........When new printers need to be added to the Common Cradle Line, the following steps need to be completed **Step 1:** Have the printer added to the Zebra Network and in the Oracle Linux Operating System............"

chunk_id2.Sub Heading 1: WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – ADDING NEW PRINTERS .....

Text:
- I have a Request for: 'A Business Application'
- Specify the Application: 'ORALE ERP SUPPLY CHAIN'
- Details required in the description: Describe the changes required
- Name of the value set (lookup): 'ZBRWMS\_SYSPACK\_PRINTERS'
- Assignment of the printers against the label types:

| Label Type - Printer   | Printer Name                    |
|------------------------|---------------------------------|
| Pack Label Printer     | Specify the name of the printer |
| Overpack Label Printer | Specify the name of the printer |
| Product Label Printer  | Specify the name of the printer |

![](_page_0_Picture_23.jpeg)

Once the 2 ServiceNow Requests have been completed you can use the new printers for the Common Cradle Assembly process.

Document: WI - ReConfig - Adding New Printers for Common Cradle v1.0.docx

Page 1 of 2 July 18, 2024

## **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION**

WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – ADDING NEW PRINTERS

*Please note: Do not forget to sign into the Pack Label Printer before you start processing the WIP Assembly Completions.*
